title: campanula rotundifolia f. ovata
intro: Campanula rotundifolia f. ovata, also known as the Scottish bellflower, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Campanulaceae. The plant's leaves and flowers have been traditionally used in herbal medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Campanula rotundifolia f. ovata include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and supporting the immune system. The plant is often prepared as a tincture, tea, or infused oil, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including colds, fever, and respiratory issues.
